name: Cedrik Neike
background: Cedrik Neike is CEO of Digital Industries and a member of the Managing Board. He joined Siemens in 1997, spent time at Cisco Systems, and returned to Siemens in 2017.

company_affiliations.name: Siemens Aktiengesellschaft
